---
title: "Integrace ukrajinských uprchlíků: rok poté"
date: 2023-04-17
description: "One-year assessment of Czech integration efforts for Ukrainian refugees, covering housing, employment, and education outcomes."
categories: [publication, second author, data analysis]
---

One year after the start of the war in Ukraine, this report takes stock of Czech efforts to integrate Ukrainian refugees — what worked in housing, employment, and education, and where significant challenges remain. It is part of our ongoing *Hlas Ukrajinců v Česku* (Voice of Ukrainians) research programme. Contributing to this project was personally meaningful given its direct humanitarian relevance.

[Read the original study →](https://www.paqresearch.cz/post/integrace-ukrajinskych-uprchliku-rok-pote/)
